sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:

created='2026-05-24 | 19:01 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem843_verify_real_response_after_tick.json')

if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='process_response_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif ps=='runtime_exists_but_real_response_missing':
    status='repair_response_writer_next'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher prompt/response writer because runtime exists but real response missing'
elif ps=='dispatch_exists_but_runtime_response_missing':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_runtime_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 runtime retry after dispatch proof exists','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify Claude runtime state'
else:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_dispatch_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 dispatch retry because dispatch/runtime/response absent after tick','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify dispatch/runtime/response'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_route_after_bem843.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Route After BEM-843 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843.json','governance/reports/bem844_route_after_bem843.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-843 and queued the next dispatch/runtime retry when needed')
